rulings.Case Title: CERVANTES, ENRIQUE vs. L/O JOHN G. HANLIN, A et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION /Demurrer To First Amended Cross Complaint; Request For Statutory Attorneys Costs And Fees Pursuant To Special Motion To Strike
rulings.Rulings: COURT ADOPTS PREVIOUS TENTATIVE RULING: DEMURRER OVERRULED, SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS PRESENTED PRIMA FACIE CASE. REQUEST FOR FEES AND COSTS DENIED. SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE NOT FRIVILOUS. MOTION FOR SANCTIONS DENIED. (CW)

rulings.Case Title: BENSON INDUSTRIES, INC. VS. CB-1 ENTERTAINMENT PARTNERS L.P. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Notice Of Hearing And Demurrer;
rulings.Rulings: AS TO DEMURRER OF DEFENDANTS DRESDENER, FLEET, AND WEST DEUTSCHE IMMOBILIEN BANKS TO PLAINTIFFS' FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 1ST AND 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS THE THE 2ND, 4TH, AND 5TH CAUSES OF ACTION. ANY AMENDMENT IS TO COMPLY WITH CRC 312(G). (JH)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Compel Arbitration And Motion To Stay Proceedings; P/A; Declaration; Request For Judicial Notice; Pos
